subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The letter thou didst write to His Honour Haydar-'Alí hath been perused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه که بحضرت حیدر قبل علی مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
